=== index ===
instrument acid-techno (53 nodes, format 3, projection 1)
doc: Acid techno rig: a four-on-the-floor 16-step drum machine (kick, snare, closed + open hi-hat), a TB-303-style monophonic acid bass synth sequencer, and a detuned three-saw pad playing sustained whole-note chords. [+1326 chars: zoom /]
/clock clock
/pad_clock clock
/kick sequencer
/kick_v voicer
/kick_trim m2s
/kick_amp mul_f32_signal
/snare sequencer
/snare_v voicer
/snare_trim m2s
/snare_amp mul_f32_signal
/chh sequencer
/chh_v voicer
/chh_trim m2s
/chh_amp mul_f32_signal
/ohh sequencer
/ohh_v voicer
/ohh_trim m2s
/ohh_amp mul_f32_signal
/dsum1 add_f32_signal
/dsum2 add_f32_signal
/dsum3 add_f32_signal
/dsat saturator
/drums_vol_cv m2s
/drums_out mul_f32_signal
/bass_harmony harmony
/key_up add_i32_value
/pad_harmony harmony
/bass_seq sequencer
/bass_mode transpose
/bass_unpack unpack_note
/bass_freq pitch2freq
/bass_glide m2s
/bass_osc oscillator
/bass_env envelope
/bass_env_amt mul_f32_signal
/bass_cutoff map_f32_signal
/bass_filter filter
/bass_ampcurve power_f32_signal
/bass_vca mul_f32_signal
/bass_vol_cv m2s
/bass_out mul_f32_signal
/pad_seq sequencer
/pad_mode transpose
/pad_chord chord
/pad_v voicer
/pad_vol_cv m2s
/pad_out mul_f32_signal
/pad_pump compressor
/mix1 add_f32_signal
/mix2 add_f32_signal
/master_verb reverb
/master_sat saturator
/out output

=== zoom / ===
instrument acid-techno (53 nodes, format 3, projection 1)
doc: Acid techno rig: a four-on-the-floor 16-step drum machine (kick, snare, closed + open hi-hat), a TB-303-style monophonic acid bass synth sequencer, and a detuned three-saw pad playing sustained whole-note chords. The bass is a single inline mono synth (saw -> resonant lowpass -> env, note line unpacked to freq/gate at rig level rather than voiced) so its 303 controls are live: /glide/in slides the pitch between notes (portamento), /squelch/in is the filter resonance (the whistling acid tone), /filter_env/in is the filter-envelope amount (how far the cutoff sweep opens), and /filter_decay/in is the envelope decay (the length of the squelch tail). Drums and bass share a 16th-note clock; the pad triggers one chord per bar. The `key` pipe (/key/in) sets the absolute tonic of a shared natural-minor harmony (bass at the root, pad one octave up). The `mode` pipe (/mode/in, 0-6) is the modal chord/scale selector: it transposes both the bass line and the pad chord by that many scale degrees, so one knob re-roots them together within the key -- the modal, chord-player-style move. Each instrument has its own volume pipe (/drums_vol/in, /bass_vol/in, /pad_vol/in); ride tempo 60-180 BPM with /tempo/in. Program the lanes with /kick_step1..16 /snare_step* /chh_step* /ohh_step* (boolean) and the bass with /bass_step1..16 (scale degrees, -1 = rest). The pad is sidechain-pumped by the kick (a `compressor` at /pad_pump keyed off the raw kick voice), so the chords breathe with the four-on-the-floor -- the signature acid-techno pump.

=== zoom /clock /kick_v /out ===
/clock clock
doc: 16th-note grid for drums + bass. division=4 -> 4 pulses per beat.
in: division=4, tempo<-/tempo
out: gate->/kick.clock, gate->/snare.clock, gate->/chh.clock, gate->/ohh.clock, gate->/bass_seq.clock
/kick_v voicer
doc: Hosts the kick-voice; the lane gate fires it.
config: voices=1
in: notes<-/kick
out: audio->/kick_amp.a, audio->/pad_pump.sidechain
res: voice=kick-voice -> voices/kick-voice.json
boundary: kick-voice (attack:value s 0.001..5=0.001, base:value Hz 20..1000=48, decay:value s 0.001..5=0.1, gate:value 0..1=0, release:value s 0.001..5=0.08, sustain:value 0..1=0, sweep:value Hz 0..2000=220) -> active:value active 0..1=0, audio:signal
/out output
in: audio<-/master_sat
out: audio->pipe:out

=== zoom --type harmony ===
/bass_harmony harmony
doc: Tonal context for the bass (natural minor). KEY/CHORD SELECTOR: the `key` pipe (/key/in) sets `root`; the whole bass line and the pad re-spell live when it changes.
in: degrees=7, root<-/key, s0=0, s1=2, s2=3, s3=5, s4=7, s5=8, s6=10
out: harmony->/bass_freq.harmony
/pad_harmony harmony
doc: Tonal context for the pad (same natural minor, one octave up). Re-spells with /key.
in: degrees=7, root<-/key_up, s0=0, s1=2, s2=3, s3=5, s4=7, s5=8, s6=10
out: harmony->/pad_v.harmony

=== pipes ===
pipes in (90):
bass_step1:f32 degree -1..24=0
bass_step10:f32 degree -1..24=7
bass_step11:f32 degree -1..24=-1
bass_step12:f32 degree -1..24=5
bass_step13:f32 degree -1..24=0
bass_step14:f32 degree -1..24=-1
bass_step15:f32 degree -1..24=3

key:i32 MIDI 24..72=45

mode:f32 degree 0..6=0

out<-/out.audio

=== resources ===
resources (5):
acid-pad-voice -> voices/acid-pad-voice.json voice:/pad_v
hat-voice -> voices/hat-voice.json voice:/chh_v

openhat-voice -> voices/openhat-voice.json voice:/ohh_v
